g.text: Ref Condo for SET PIN (important pour les vibrations P16)

g.desc: Ref Condo for SET PIN (important pour les vibrations P16)

g.text: condensateur tantale solide SMD moulé, 1206 / 3216 (A case),

g.desc: condensateur tantale solide SMD moulé, 1206 / 3216 (A case),

g.style: fill:none; stroke:none;

g.text: IN (pins 1-2): LT3042 power input (6V), to be decoupled with CIN.

g.desc: IN (pins 1-2): LT3042 power input (6V), to be decoupled with CIN.

g.text: EN/UV (pin 3): enables/disables the regulator and allows an UVLO threshold (often tied to IN for

g.desc: EN/UV (pin 3): enables/disables the regulator and allows an UVLO threshold (often tied to IN for

g.text: PG (pin 4): open-collector Power-Good output (requires a pull-up resistor).

g.desc: PG (pin 4): open-collector Power-Good output (requires a pull-up resistor).

g.text: ILIM (pin 5): current limit programming/monitoring (often tied to GND if unused).

g.desc: ILIM (pin 5): current limit programming/monitoring (often tied to GND if unused).

g.text: PGFB (pin 6): input that sets the Power-Good threshold via a resistor divider from VOUT.

g.desc: PGFB (pin 6): input that sets the Power-Good threshold via a resistor divider from VOUT.

g.text: SET (pin 7): sets the output voltage via RSET (and CSET reduces noise / provides soft-start).

g.desc: SET (pin 7): sets the output voltage via RSET (and CSET reduces noise / provides soft-start).

g.text: OUTS (pin 9): Kelvin output sense (to be connected to the + of COUT / load point).

g.desc: OUTS (pin 9): Kelvin output sense (to be connected to the + of COUT / load point).

g.text: OUT (pin 10): regulated output (5V), to be decoupled with COUT.

g.desc: OUT (pin 10): regulated output (5V), to be decoupled with COUT.

g.text: EPAD (exposed pad): ground + thermal dissipation (to be soldered to the GND plane).

g.desc: EPAD (exposed pad): ground + thermal dissipation (to be soldered to the GND plane).

g.style: fill:none; stroke:none;
fill:none; stroke:none;

g.text: The LT®3042 is a high performance low dropout linear regulator featuring LTC's ultralow noise and ultrahigh PSRR architecture for powering noise sensitive RF

g.desc: The LT®3042 is a high performance low dropout linear regulator featuring LTC's ultralow noise and ultrahigh PSRR architecture for powering noise sensitive RF

g.text: applications. Designed as a precision current reference followed by a high performance voltage buffer, the LT3042 can be easily paralleled to further reduce noise,

g.desc: applications. Designed as a precision current reference followed by a high performance voltage buffer, the LT3042 can be easily paralleled to further reduce noise,

g.text: increase output current and spread heat on the PCB. The device supplies 200mA at a typical 350mV dropout voltage. Operating quiescent current is nominally 2mA

g.desc: increase output current and spread heat on the PCB. The device supplies 200mA at a typical 350mV dropout voltage. Operating quiescent current is nominally 2mA

g.text: and drops to <<1µA in shutdown. The LT3042's wide output voltage range (0V to 15V) while maintaining unitygain operation provides virtually constant output noise,

g.desc: and drops to <<1µA in shutdown. The LT3042's wide output voltage range (0V to 15V) while maintaining unitygain operation provides virtually constant output noise,

g.text: PSRR, bandwidth and load regulation, independent of the programmed output voltage. Additionally, the regulator features programmable current limit, fast start-up

g.desc: PSRR, bandwidth and load regulation, independent of the programmed output voltage. Additionally, the regulator features programmable current limit, fast start-up

g.text: capability and programmable power good to indicate output voltage regulation. The LT3042 is stable with a minimum 4.7µF ceramic output capacitor. Built-in

g.desc: capability and programmable power good to indicate output voltage regulation. The LT3042 is stable with a minimum 4.7µF ceramic output capacitor. Built-in

g.text: protection includes reverse battery protection, reverse current protection, internal current limit with foldback and thermal limit with hysteresis. The LT3042 is available

g.desc: protection includes reverse battery protection, reverse current protection, internal current limit with foldback and thermal limit with hysteresis. The LT3042 is available

g.text: in thermally enhanced 10-Lead MSOP and 3mm × 3mm DFN package

g.desc: in thermally enhanced 10-Lead MSOP and 3mm × 3mm DFN package
